text.title: monorepo-turborepo Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for monorepo-turborepo. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Place applications under apps/ and shared packages under packages/; never mix app and library code in the same directory.
rule.rationale: Turborepo's filter syntax and task graph require a predictable location to distinguish deployable apps from reusable packages.

rule.statement: Use workspace:* for all internal dependencies and never floating semver ranges like ^, ~, or >=.
rule.rationale: workspace:* resolves to local symlinks; floating ranges can accidentally resolve to a published npm version, breaking workspace isolation.

rule.statement: Use the tasks field (not pipeline) in turbo.json v2; always declare outputs for every task even if empty for side-effect-only tasks.
rule.rationale: Turborepo 2.x renamed pipeline to tasks. Missing outputs means the task is never cached; Turborepo runs it on every invocation without skipping.

rule.statement: Pin packageManager to a specific pnpm version in root package.json and set engines.node to enforce the runtime Node version.
rule.rationale: Mismatched pnpm versions produce lockfile churn; mismatched Node versions cause silent behavior differences across local and CI environments.

rule.statement: App packages depend on workspace:* packages via devDependencies for config and dependencies for shared runtime code; never import from apps/ — only from packages/.
rule.rationale: Importing from another app creates an implicit coupling that Turborepo cannot model as a task dependency, causing stale builds and build order violations.

rule.statement: Build library packages with tsup (esm + cjs + dts); declare all export conditions in the exports field — types, import, require.
rule.rationale: Consumers need correct module resolution for bundler, Node CJS, and TypeScript type-checking. Missing conditions cause silent any-type fallback.

rule.statement: Extend a single packages/config/tsconfig/base.json in every package; never diverge per-package tsconfig settings without extending the base.
rule.rationale: Per-package divergence leads to type desync: the same symbol compiles differently in different packages, causing subtle runtime bugs.

rule.statement: Publish an eslint-preset.js from packages/config with main and exports pointing to the file; reference it via @monorepo/config/eslint-preset in each package.
rule.rationale: Without exports, eslint cannot resolve the preset path across workspace symlinks and different resolution contexts.

rule.statement: Always use the tasks field in new turbo.json; treat any pipeline field as a migration signal to update to v2 syntax.
rule.rationale: Most training data for agents predates Turborepo 2.x. Agents will generate pipeline-based config that silently produces wrong behavior on v2.

rule.statement: Store TURBO_TOKEN in GitHub Secrets, never in vars; set signature: true in turbo.json remoteCache only when secretKey is also configured.
rule.rationale: Token in vars is readable by any workflow run; signature: true without a secretKey is a no-op that provides false security assurance.

rule.statement: Use workspace:* for internal deps; never floating ranges. Lockfile resolves to local symlinks.
rule.rationale: Floating ranges can resolve to published npm versions if workspace:* is missing, breaking isolation.

rule.statement: Keep package boundaries strict: a UI package never imports from an app. Enforce via eslint-plugin-import no-restricted-paths or dependency-cruiser.
rule.rationale: Loose boundaries create implicit couplings that Turborepo cannot model, causing stale builds.

rule.statement: Output declarations from libraries (tsc --emitDeclarationOnly or tsup --dts) and consume types from dist, not src. Avoids massive type-graph rebuilds.
rule.rationale: Importing types from src triggers recompilation of entire type graphs; consuming from dist breaks the dependency chain.

rule.statement: Hash-aware caching: list every input that affects build under inputs in turbo.json (e.g., *.css, prisma/schema.prisma); otherwise cache rot or false hits.
rule.rationale: Turborepo's hash ignores inputs outside the listed globs; missing inputs cause stale caches.

rule.statement: Pin Node + pnpm via engines + packageManager so agent runs and CI runs match local. Mismatched pnpm = lockfile churn.
rule.rationale: Version mismatch causes silent behavior differences and lockfile corruption.

rule.statement: Use Changesets for versioning even private packages — generates per-package CHANGELOGs that humans/agents can reason about.
rule.rationale: Per-package changelogs track who changed what and why, enabling better code review and release notes.

rule.statement: Don't hand-edit per-package tsconfigs; extend a single base. Agents diverge configs subtly per package, then types desync.
rule.rationale: Type desync across packages causes silent bugs where the same symbol compiles differently depending on the package.
